recommendations.title: We're All Going to the World's Fair
recommendations.overview: Reality and fantasy begin to blur when a teenager, alone in her attic bedroom, immerses herself in a role-playing horror game online.

recommendations.title: Rental Family
recommendations.overview: An American actor in Tokyo struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese 'rental family' agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds th

recommendations.title: Synecdoche, New York
recommendations.overview: A theater director struggles with his work, and the women in his life, as he attempts to create a life-size replica of New York inside a warehouse as part of his new play.

recommendations.title: The Big Hit
recommendations.overview: Etienne, an often out of work but endearing actor, runs a theater workshop in a prison, where he brings  together an unlikely troupe of prisoners to stage Samuel Beckett’s famous play Waiting for Godot. When he is allowed to take the colorful band of

recommendations.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid
recommendations.overview: Greg Heffley is a scrawny but ambitious kid with an active imagination and big plans to be rich and famous – he just has to survive middle school first.

recommendations.title: Epidemic
recommendations.overview: A director and screenwriter pen a script and, in the process, blur the line between fiction and reality.

recommendations.title: Youth
recommendations.overview: A group of performing art troupe members each face their own trials and tribulations in Chengdu; from escaping a family scandal to dealing with unrequited love, each experiences rejection that shapes their lives.

recommendations.title: The Dirties
recommendations.overview: The line between reality and fiction starts to blur when two best friends start making a movie about getting revenge on bullies.

recommendations.title: Cadaver
recommendations.overview: In the aftermath of a nuclear disaster, a starving family finds hope in a charismatic hotel owner. Lured by the prospect of a free dinner, they discover that the evening's entertainment blurs the lines between performance and reality. Will they wind

recommendations.title: Newness
recommendations.overview: In contemporary Los Angeles, two millennials navigating a social media–driven hookup culture begin a relationship that pushes both emotional and physical boundaries.
